executionArgs.additionalInstruction:
Generate exactly these 4 backend API tests with no additional tests:

1. Test: GET /status endpoint
   - Method: GET
   - URL: http://localhost:5000/status
   - Expected: Status code 200
   - Expected Response: JSON contains { "ok": true }

2. Test: GET /auth/me without cookie
   - Method: GET
   - URL: http://localhost:5000/auth/me
   - No cookies sent
   - Expected: Status code 401

3. Test: POST /auth/e2e/login
   - Method: POST
   - URL: http://localhost:5000/auth/e2e/login
   - Body: { "id": "e2e_user_1", "email": "e2e@test.local", "name": "E2E User" }
   - Content-Type: application/json
   - Expected: Status code 200
   - Expected Response: JSON { "ok": true }
   - Expected: Response sets an httpOnly session cookie

4. Test: GET /auth/me with session cookie from test 3
   - Method: GET
   - URL: http://localhost:5000/auth/me
   - Use the session cookie set from the previous e2e/login test
   - Expected: Status code 200
   - Expected Response: JSON contains user.id and user.email
